---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(vegan)

# read data
meta <- read_csv("mapping.csv")
mat  <- read_csv("cazy_family_matrix.csv")

# merge
data <- meta %>%
  left_join(mat, by = "FileBase")
```


```{r}
cazy_cols <- grep("^(GH|GT|PL|CE|CBM|AA)", names(data), value = TRUE)
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    cazy_richness = rowSums(across(all_of(cazy_cols), ~ .x > 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    total_hits = rowSums(across(all_of(cazy_cols)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

# between section

## only keep three strains both has large and small intestine
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# find species that have BOTH sections
valid_species <- data %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(n_section = n_distinct(Section)) %>%
  filter(n_section == 2) %>%
  pull(Species)

# subset data
data_sub <- data %>%
  filter(Species %in% valid_species)

long <- data_sub %>%
  select(FileBase, Section, all_of(cazy_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(cazy_cols),
    names_to = "CAZy",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

res <- long %>%
  group_by(CAZy) %>%
  summarise(
    large_mean = mean(Count[Section == "Large_intestine"], na.rm = TRUE),
    small_mean = mean(Count[Section == "Small_intestine"], na.rm = TRUE),
    p = tryCatch(
      wilcox.test(Count ~ Section, exact = FALSE)$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diff = large_mean - small_mean,
    p_adj = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(diff)))
```
## each species seperate figure
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# species with both sections
valid_species <- data %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(n_section = n_distinct(Section)) %>%
  filter(n_section == 2) %>%
  pull(Species)

plot_one_species <- function(sp, data, cazy_cols) {
  
  df <- data %>% filter(Species == sp)
  
  long <- df %>%
    select(FileBase, Section, all_of(cazy_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(cazy_cols),
      names_to = "CAZy",
      values_to = "Count"
    )
  
  res_sp <- long %>%
    group_by(CAZy) %>%
    summarise(
      large_mean = mean(Count[Section == "Large_intestine"], na.rm = TRUE),
      small_mean = mean(Count[Section == "Small_intestine"], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(diff = large_mean - small_mean) %>%
    filter(!(large_mean == 0 & small_mean == 0)) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(diff))) %>%
    slice_head(n = 10)
  
  # important: use unique ordered CAZy names for this species only
  cazy_order <- rev(res_sp$CAZy)
  
  plot_long_sp <- res_sp %>%
    select(CAZy, large_mean, small_mean) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(large_mean, small_mean),
      names_to = "Section",
      values_to = "Mean_count"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Section = recode(
        Section,
        large_mean = "Large_intestine",
        small_mean = "Small_intestine"
      ),
      CAZy = factor(CAZy, levels = cazy_order)
    )
  
  ggplot(plot_long_sp, aes(x = CAZy, y = Mean_count, fill = Section)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.65) +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_bw() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "Large_intestine" = "violet",
      "Small_intestine" = "skyblue3"
    )) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Mean CAZyme count",
      title = sp
    )
}
plots <- lapply(valid_species, function(sp) {
  plot_one_species(sp, data, cazy_cols)
})

names(plots) <- valid_species

plots[[1]]
plots[[2]]
plots[[3]]

dir.create("species_plots", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (sp in names(plots)) {
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0("species_plots/", sp, "_cazy_section.png"),
    plot = plots[[sp]],
    width = 6,
    height = 4,
    dpi = 600
  )
}
```
# mucus vs lumen
```{r}
data$Milieu <- factor(data$Milieu, levels = c("Lumen", "Mucosa"))
```

## difference betwene melieu
```{r}
long <- data %>%
  select(FileBase, Milieu, all_of(cazy_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(cazy_cols),
               names_to = "CAZy",
               values_to = "Count")

res <- long %>%
  group_by(CAZy) %>%
  summarise(
    mucosa_mean = mean(Count[Milieu == "Mucosa"]),
    lumen_mean = mean(Count[Milieu == "Lumen"]),
    p = wilcox.test(Count ~ Milieu)$p.value
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diff = mucosa_mean - lumen_mean,
    p_adj = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  arrange(p)

head(res, 20)
```

## plot top different CAZYME
top 10 mucus enriched
top 5 lumen enriched
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
mucosa_top <- res %>%
  filter(diff > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(diff)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

lumen_top <- res %>%
  filter(diff < 0) %>%
  arrange(diff) %>%   # most negative first
  slice_head(n = 5)

# choose top CAZymes by absolute difference
plot_res <- bind_rows(mucosa_top, lumen_top) %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = case_when(
      diff > 0 ~ "Mucosa-enriched",
      diff < 0 ~ "Lumen-enriched"
    )
  )

# convert to long format
plot_long <- plot_res %>%
  select(CAZy, mucosa_mean, lumen_mean, Direction, diff) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mucosa_mean, lumen_mean),
    names_to = "Milieu",
    values_to = "Mean_count"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Milieu = recode(Milieu,
                    mucosa_mean = "Mucosa",
                    lumen_mean = "Lumen"),
    CAZy = factor(CAZy, levels = plot_res$CAZy)
  )
# separator position (between top 10 and bottom 5)
sep_line <- 10.5

# label positions
label_df <- data.frame(
  x = c(-1, 3),  # adjust if needed
  y = c(max(plot_long$Mean_count) * 1.1,
        max(plot_long$Mean_count) * 1.1),
  label = c("Mucosa-enriched", "Lumen-enriched")
)
p <- ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = CAZy, y = Mean_count, fill = Milieu)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.65) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 10.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = 3,  y = max(plot_long$Mean_count) * 1.25,
           label = "Mucosa-enriched", fontface = "bold", hjust = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 13, y = max(plot_long$Mean_count) * 1.25,
           label = "Lumen-enriched", fontface = "bold", hjust = 0.5) +
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  expand_limits(y = max(plot_long$Mean_count) * 1.45) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 50, 10, 10),  # top, right, bottom, left
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Mucosa" = "pink", "Lumen" = "#377EB8")) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean CAZyme count",
    title = "Top CAZyme families enriched in mucosa vs lumen"
  )

p

ggsave("top cazyme between meileu.png", plot=p, dpi=600)
```
